summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of L'atelier Secret migration with new taupe color scheme and design requirements
passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct taupe color scheme (#b5a48b)
Hero section displays 'Exprimez votre beauté naturelle.' text correctly
Navigation menu dropdown menus work properly
Header CTA 'Réserver maintenant' button visible and functional
Services section displays exactly 4 service cards as required
Footer NAP information correct and SEO-friendly
Booking page loads with functional multi-step form
Hair removal pricing page loads with 24 pricing items
All buttons are rectangular (no rounded corners) as required
Form validation and mocked API submission successful
CTA buttons correctly redirect to booking page
Font implementation (Cormorant Garamond + Montserrat) appears correct
No italic fonts used (following design requirements)
